headline: Hot property: five homes for sale in Costa Rica
summary: From a villa nestled in the jungle with a waterfall to another whose terrace is bordered by a curved infinity pool overlooking the Pacific
body_text:
Where In a gated community on the coast of Costa Rica’s Puntarenas province, above Dominicalito beach. It’s roughly 80km south of San José, and the drive to Juan Santamaría airport takes between 3 and 4 hours.

What A hillside home of 777 sq m, nestled in the jungle. The main house has nine bedrooms and eight bathrooms, with features including a waterfall and pond, pool with swim-up bar, Jacuzzi, outdoor cooking area, gym and parking for five cars.

Why In addition to the main house, there is a large separate games room and bar for entertaining, as well as two fully equipped casitas — each with their own kitchen, bathroom and terrace.

Who Dominical Property

Where In the south of Heredia province, about 11km north of San José. Juan Santamaría airport is roughly 45 minutes away by car.

What A five-bedroom house on 4.4 acres with marble interiors, a wine cellar/bar, gym and pool. Many of the furnishings and artworks are included in the sale. A guest house has an additional three bedroo
